members.name: connectionsFailed
members.description: The number of times this operator has failed to make a connection to any URL.

members.name: connectionsLost
members.description: The number of times this operator has lost a connection it has previous successfully established.

members.name: frameTime
members.description: The timestamp of the currently shown frame, in seconds.

members.name: isConnected
members.description: True if connected to target URL.

members.name: isConnecting
members.description: True if attempting to connect to target URL.

members.name: isOddField
members.description: When de-interlacing, this tells if the odd field is currently being shown.

members.name: videoHeight
members.description: Height of the movie, in pixels.

members.name: videoWidth
members.description: Width of the movie, in pixels.

methods.name: unload
methods.description: Unloads the video stream and frees it's memory usage. The stream will open again next time it cooks, so make sure nothing is still using it to keep it closed. *cacheMemory - (Keyword, Optional) If True the memory (textures, upload buffers) of the movie will be cached for use by another movie later on. Useful if you are opening/closing many movies with the same codec and resolution.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the VideostreaminTOP Class wiki page
